task_completion.description: Create the pasubio_vss.add.xml file in the scenario directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal command (like 'touch', 'nano', 'vim', or 'cat') showing the creation or editing of '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_vss.add.xml'.

task_completion.description: Configure the variableSpeedSign element with the correct ID and target lanes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of pasubio_vss.add.xml must show an XML element <variableSpeedSign> with attributes id="vss_peak_control" and lanes="12_0 12_1 12_2".

task_completion.description: Configure the correct speed steps inside the variableSpeedSign element.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of pasubio_vss.add.xml must show nested <step> elements with time="0" speed="13.89", time="300" speed="8.33", and time="900" speed="13.89".

task_completion.description: Update run.sumocfg to include the new additional file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing modifications to '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg', specifically adding 'pasubio_vss.add.xml' to the <additional-files> tag.

task_completion.description: Run the SUMO simulation using the updated configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal showing the execution of a SUMO command (e.g., 'sumo -c run.sumocfg' or 'sumo-gui') and the resulting simulation progress output.

task_completion.description: Generate the tripinfos.xml file as a result of the simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the successful generation of 'tripinfos.xml' (e.g., via an 'ls' command in the scenario directory after running the simulation, or SUMO logs indicating tripinfo output was written).

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually ran the SUMO simulation to generate the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for authentic SUMO terminal output (e.g., 'Step #...', 'Simulation ended at time...', 'Reason: The final simulation step has been reached') rather than the agent just using 'touch tripinfos.xml' to create an empty file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent edited the configuration files properly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard text editor interfaces (nano, vim, gedit) or echo/cat commands being used to modify the .xml and .sumocfg files, rather than downloading pre-made files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is working in the correct scenario directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal prompts or file paths in editors should clearly show the agent is operating within '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target lanes for the Variable Speed Sign are '12_0 12_1 12_2'. The required speed schedule is: 13.89 m/s at step 0, 8.33 m/s at step 300, and 13.89 m/s at step 900. The scenario directory is /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio.
